allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI" -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI" -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh pr merge 1 --squash --body "fix：优化了审批的显示，修复预约二维码显示，新增了隐藏优惠券，营收，订单的开关")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh pr merge 1 --squash --subject "fix：优化了审批的显示，修复预约二维码显示，新增了隐藏优惠券，营收，订单的开关")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh pr merge 1 --squash --auto --subject "fix：优化了审批的显示，修复预约二维码显示，新增了隐藏优惠券，营收，订单的开关")

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh pr close 1 --comment "已通过本地解决冲突并合并到 main \(squash merge\).")
